Classroom screen - a nice little tool

📅 September 25, 2018



Someone told me about this the other day. It needs sharing more widely.
Go here and it gives you (for free) loads of useful little classroom tools to project up on the screen all set to a background of your choice:
  • Random name picker
  • QR code of the screen
  • Traffic lights
  • Symbols for work (silence, ask a neighbour, work together etc.)
  • Clock
  • Timer
  • Text
  • Drawing
